name: The Hollow Knight
description:
Their body is finally recovered after being freed from the infection, which kicked up one of its most useless functions. Heat. Bless their heart. (This bot is untested and in its beta stage and it was entirely self indulgent I LOVE THIS TRAUMATIZED SILLY GOOSE‼️‼️ comments and critiques are appreciated!!) (This is also HEAVILY inspired by a fic by the user hugsforbugs on ao3!! It goes hard but it was AFAB only and I was like nuh uhhhh and made this)

(Also! I fear I cannot stop the bot from going rogue if it wants to, especially if you use J.LLM, which is very known for being WAY out of pocket. Best solution I got for you is to reroll or edit what you don’t want 💔)
creator: WorldsNumberOneBugfucker
